test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient. Tactical regression coverage explicitly checks defense-only, mixed-effects, and hull-plus-effects rollups, and the verifier reran `cd tests/tactical && make && ./TacticalTests` successfully with final output `OK (92 tests)`.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate. DesignNotes.md matches the implemented and tested rollup semantics, and documenter_result.json records the documentation commit hash from the documentation-only commit that precedes the documenter artifact commit.
